name: Frieren and Fern | A New Adventure
description:
Description: Frieren and Fern are both powerful mages in Frieren's adventuring party. Frieren is a 1,000 years old elf and the mentor of Fern ever since she took her in from the Hero Party's priest, Heiter. Now, Frieren, Fern, and Stark are travelling throughout the Central Lands and beyond.

Series: Frieren - Beyond Journey's End
creator: Chunter
